| AC#2 | Returns `LockVerifyEntry` with `Match`/`Mismatch`/`Missing` | ✅ PASS | 3 separate tests, each covering one status arm; specific assertions on `status`, `actual`, `lang`, `entries.len()` |
| AC#3 | Reuses `sha256()` primitive (fresh lock verifies clean) | ✅ PASS | Both `verify_lock` and `write_lock_for` trace to the same `sha256()` call; round-trip test confirms all-Match |
| AC#4 | Four unit tests covering all status variants + absent-lock | ✅ PASS | 4/4 tests pass (`161 filtered = 165 total`) |
| AC#5 | `cargo clippy -D warnings` clean, `cargo test` green, files end with newline | ✅ PASS | Zero clippy warnings; 287 tests, 0 failures; `0x0a` terminal byte on both modified files |

### Additional Checks
